section3.description: Uniajc Virtual (UVI) offers you different ways, spaces, and tools for creation and guidance in the development of digital competence. An example of this is the base projects that are available to the educational community every semester, the Innovative projects that are spaces for co-creating experiences and new projects between internal and/or external departments. Here, you also find how to create Digital Learning Experiences.

section5.title: Discover
section5.description: The current digital era and technology for education offer a wide range of tools that can enrich your teaching and learning experiences, available on different devices, which you can explore online. That's why UVI has a multitude of digital tools and audiovisual resources for you to discover. Exploring the vast digital world will provide you with valuable knowledge.
